description: Live proof of staged content quality pipeline (Task 23). Four validation phases: (1) Call Agent sub-workflow isolation, (2) ClickUp/Doc integration happy path, (3) blocker handling, (4) self-echo filtering.

checklist.detail: pnpm build:workflows:check: committed JSON matches builder output
pnpm vendor:gate: ClickUp API + n8n API reachable, credentials configured
Critérios de Aceite (bd2e7a51-3e9e-4d6a-9729-770fac44a504), Editorial Doc URL (fc421386-3bc8-4dca-adce-836a8f3d4d6d)
investigate, brief review, write, content review, format, final review, publish, Closed
Call Agent sub-workflow available in n8n.wolven.com.br (workflow imports from marketing-pipelines/call-agent-subworkflow.json)
Marketing Pipeline main workflow available in n8n.wolven.com.br (workflow imports from marketing-pipelines/marketing-pipeline-main.json)
Manual step: Bind ClickUp, GitHub (read-only PAT), OpenAI credentials in n8n; activate Marketing Pipeline workflow

phase_1_call_agent_isolation.objective: Verify Call Agent sub-workflow invokes OpenAI correctly and parses stage outputs

test_cases.expected: Execution completes without error; Parse Agent Output returns JSON with stage, artifact_markdown, resumo, self_check, next_gate
At least one Hardcoded Test Input payload produces blocker_question in parsed output
Disable OpenAI JSON mode; Parse Agent Output returns error envelope (not partial output)
Assemble Prompt node includes: agent config, wolven-voice skill, stage reference/template files

phase_2_main_workflow_integration.objective: Validate Doc creation, page replacement, custom field writing, status advancement through full happy path

test_task.name: Live Proof - Happy Path Test
test_task.description: LinkedIn post on staged editorial workflows for AI-assisted content
test_task.criterios_de_aceite: 1. Explain staged workflow benefits; 2. Include concrete rework example; 3. Fit LinkedIn limit; 4. Use Wolven tone

happy_path_sequence.action: Create task in Backlog, move to Investigate
expected_within_60s: Doc created and URL in Editorial Doc URL field
Brief page created with investigation artifact
Pointer comment posted with [CQ-AI] prefix, resumo, next_gate

happy_path_sequence.action: Lead leaves comment, moves task to Write
Lead leaves comment, moves task to Format
expected_within_60s: Final Draft page created with Wolven-voice LinkedIn post
Pointer comment posted with resumo and self-check

happy_path_sequence.action: Move task back to Write (simulate feedback requiring revision)
expected_within_60s: Argument page replaced with new content
Brief and Final Draft pages preserved (not modified)

phase_3_blocker_handling.objective: Verify blockers post comments and return to previous gate

test_task.name: Live Proof - Blocker Test
test_task.description: Intentionally minimal criteria to trigger blocker

test_sequence.expected: blocker_question in parsed output; [CQ-BLOCKER] comment posted; status returned to Backlog
Add answer to comment; move back to Investigate; stage succeeds with normal pointer (not blocker)

phase_4_self_echo_filtering.objective: Confirm status auto-advances do not trigger re-runs (self-echo rejection)

old_status_task_migration.step: Review live Marketing Pipeline for old statuses (Ready, Writing, Approval, Needs Review)
old_status_task_migration.migration_plan: See clickup/list-schema.md for decision tree per old status

webhook_registration.step: Register ClickUp webhook: Task Status Updated event on Marketing Pipeline list

rollout_gate_status.notes: Awaiting manual execution of Phase 1-4 validation steps. Preflight checks all pass — infrastructure is ready.
